items.original_text: Interesting. Leave Delaware: 🚨ExxonMobil shareholders just approved (71.3%) to leave New Jersey for Texas. Incorporated in NJ since 1882. After 144 years, it's over. One of the largest companies in the world had every option on the table. They didn't pick Delaware. They picked Texas. Glass Lewis said no.
items.zh_text: 有趣。离开特拉华州：🚨埃克森美孚股东刚刚以71.3%的投票批准离开新泽西州迁往得克萨斯州。该公司自1882年起在新泽西州注册成立。经过144年后，这一切结束了。作为全球最大的公司之一，它拥有所有选择。他们没有选择特拉华州，而是选择了得克萨斯州。Glass Lewis表示反对。

items.original_text: 🚨 BREAKING - Use Agent Swarms To Build Complex Software Systems Use - Opus 4.7 High - GPT 5.5 xHigh - Gemini 3.5 Pro - Seedance 2.0 - GPT Image 2.0 & NanoBanana Pro - DeepSeek v4 + Kimi 2.6 combined into an Agent Swarm to build complex full-stack software products Stop paying for CRMs and SaaS, Just create custom software tailored for your organization
items.zh_text: 🚨 突发 - 使用智能体集群构建复杂软件系统 - Opus 4.7 High - GPT 5.5 xHigh - Gemini 3.5 Pro - Seedance 2.0 - GPT Image 2.0 和 NanoBanana Pro - DeepSeek v4 + Kimi 2.6 组合成一个智能体集群，用于构建复杂的全栈软件产品。停止为CRM和SaaS付费，只需为你的组织量身定制专属软件。

items.original_text: AI should dramatically increase quality of life and individual freedoms for people around the world. The OpenAI Foundation is making an initial $250M commitment to measurement, transition support, and new approaches to broadly shared prosperity. http://openaifoundation.org/news/economic-futures-in-the-age-of-ai
items.zh_text: AI 应大幅提升全球人民的生活质量和个人自由。OpenAI 基金会初步承诺投入 2.5 亿美元，用于衡量、转型支持以及探索实现广泛共享繁荣的新途径。http://openaifoundation.org/news/economic-futures-in-the-age-of-ai

items.original_text: 🛫 Hermeus: Supersonic. Mach 1.21. Quarterhorse Mk 2.1 is now the world’s first privately developed, unmanned supersonic jet and the fastest unmanned aircraft flying today. This flight makes Hermeus the fastest company in aviation history to go from founding to supersonic flight - exactly
items.zh_text: 🛫 Hermeus：超音速。马赫1.21。Quarterhorse Mk 2.1 现已成为全球首款私人研发的无人超音速喷气机，也是当今飞行速度最快的无人飞行器。此次飞行使 Hermeus 成为航空史上从创立到实现超音速飞行速度最快的公司。

items.original_text: RT NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman The entire event yesterday, launching missions, landers, rovers, tech demos building a Moon Base, and sci-fi capabilities like MoonFall, brought to you by those who Dare Mighty Things. Just the very beginning. What a time 🇺🇸 NASA JPL: Four JPL-built propulsive drones – known as MoonFall – will survey the lunar surface at potential @NASAArtemis landing sites in unprecedented detail. The mission is part of the initial phase of the @NASAMoonBase initiative. Learn more: https://www.jpl.nasa.gov/missions/moonfall/
items.zh_text: 美国国家航空航天局（NASA）局长贾里德·艾萨克曼：昨天整个活动——发射任务、着陆器、月球车、技术演示、建设月球基地，以及像“月落”（MoonFall）这样的科幻级能力——都是由那些敢于挑战伟大事业的人们带给你的。这仅仅是个开始。多么激动人心的时代 🇺🇸 NASA喷气推进实验室（JPL）：四架由JPL建造的推进式无人机——被称为“月落”（MoonFall）——将在前所未有的细节下，在潜在的@NASAArtemis着陆点勘测月球表面。该任务是@NASAMoonBase计划初始阶段的一部分。了解更多：https://www.jpl.nasa.gov/missions/moonfall/

items.original_text: RT X Freeze I just found something interesting hidden on the SpaceX website Go to: http://SpaceX.com → Human Spaceflight → Space Station → scroll all the way down → “Play Now” It’s a live Dragon docking simulator where you try docking with the ISS yourself And really… this game is way trickier than it looks You think it’ll be simple until the capsule starts drifting sideways and rotating at the same time 😭 Made me realize how insanely precise real docking actually is. The controls, timing, movement… everything has to be perfect
items.zh_text: 转推 X Freeze 我刚刚在 SpaceX 网站上发现了一些有趣的东西 前往：http://SpaceX.com → 载人航天 → 空间站 → 一直向下滚动 → “立即体验” 这是一个实时的龙飞船对接模拟器，你可以尝试自己与国际空间站对接 说实话……这个游戏比看起来要难得多 你以为很简单，直到太空舱开始侧向漂移并同时旋转 😭 这让我意识到真正的对接有多么精确。控制、时机、移动……一切都必须完美无缺

items.original_text: RT Sawyer Merritt NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman: "@SpaceX is probably our greatest commercial space company, hands down. We rely on SpaceX heavily to put our astronauts to and from the international space station."
items.zh_text: 转发 索耶·梅里特 美国国家航空航天局局长贾里德·艾萨克曼：“毫无疑问，SpaceX 可能是我们最伟大的商业航天公司。我们严重依赖 SpaceX 将我们的宇航员送往国际空间站并返回。”

items.original_text: OpenAI for self-improving tax agents: Samay: At @ThriveHoldings, we built a product with @OpenAI to automate tax prep for the 30+ accounting firms we own across the country. This season, it processed 7k+ returns. But what I think is more interesting is that the product meaningfully self-improved as accountants used it.
items.zh_text: OpenAI 用于自我改进的税务代理：Samay：在 @ThriveHoldings，我们与 @OpenAI 合作开发了一款产品，为我们旗下全国 30 多家会计师事务所自动化税务准备工作。本季，它处理了 7000 多份报税表。但我认为更有趣的是，随着会计师的使用，该产品实现了有意义的自我改进。

items.original_text: Underappreciated how capable GPT-5.5 is at cybersecurity: Philo Groves: GPT 5.5 found a 27-year-old RCE introduced in April of 1999. I've triple-checked the flow and commit history, it's real. Can't wait to responsibly disclose!
items.zh_text: GPT-5.5在网络安全方面的能力被低估了：Philo Groves：GPT-5.5发现了一个1999年4月引入的、存在27年的远程代码执行漏洞。我已经三次核对了流程和提交历史，这是真的。迫不及待要负责任地披露了！

items.original_text: Codex for parallel browser-using subagents: George Pickett: The wild part of Codex sub-agents isn't that one AI can use Chrome. It's watching a single prompt turn into seven browser sessions running at the same time. Flights, cars, Airbnbs, hikes, forms, checkout pages. Still rough around the edges but still feels like the future
items.zh_text: Codex 用于并行使用浏览器的子代理：George Pickett：Codex 子代理的疯狂之处不在于一个 AI 能使用 Chrome，而在于看着一个提示变成七个同时运行的浏览器会话。航班、汽车、Airbnb、徒步、表单、结账页面。虽然还有些粗糙，但感觉这就是未来。

items.original_text: RT Mojtaba Seyedhosseini Gemini Embedding 2: A Native Multimodal Embedding Model from Gemini 🚀 Today, we’re sharing the @GoogleDeepMind white paper for GE 2, our first native multimodal embedding model. Whether it’s text, audio, video, or image, GE 2 provides a unified representation of the input.
items.zh_text: 转推 Mojtaba Seyedhosseini：Gemini Embedding 2：来自 Gemini 的原生多模态嵌入模型 🚀 今天，我们分享 @Google DeepMind 关于 GE 2 的白皮书，这是我们首个原生多模态嵌入模型。无论是文本、音频、视频还是图像，GE 2 都能提供输入的统⼀表示。

items.original_text: RT Eric Levitz Trump could have presided over a very strong economy. All he had to do was...nothing: Inflation was trending downward, the AI boom was raising growth. Instead, he engineered a global trade war and energy shock, while shrinking America's labor force. https://www.vox.com/politics/489397/inflation-prices-iran-war-tariffs-trump
items.zh_text: 转发 Eric Levitz：特朗普本可以领导一个非常强劲的经济。他只需要……什么都不做：通胀呈下降趋势，人工智能繁荣正在推动增长。相反，他策划了一场全球贸易战和能源冲击，同时缩减了美国的劳动力。https://www.vox.com/politics/489397/inflation-prices-iran-war-tariffs-trump

items.original_text: RT Roshan Rao Announcing ESMFold2, our new state-of-the-art structure prediction model capable of predicting structure from single sequences or MSAs. ESMFold2 improves on benchmarks of protein-protein interaction and is particularly strong on predictions of antibody-antigen complexes. Alex Rives: Today we're announcing ESMFold2, an open scientific engine to power prediction, design, and discovery across protein biology. The new model delivers state of the art performance on protein interactions, especially antibodies, a critical modality for therapeutics. We have
items.zh_text: 转 Roshan Rao：宣布 ESMFold2，我们最新的最先进结构预测模型，能够从单序列或多序列比对预测结构。ESMFold2 在蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用基准上有所改进，在抗体-抗原复合物的预测方面尤其强大。Alex Rives：今天我们宣布 ESMFold2，一个开放的科学引擎，用于推动蛋白质生物学领域的预测、设计和发现。新模型在蛋白质相互作用（尤其是抗体，一种关键的治疗模式）上提供了最先进的性能。

items.original_text: RT Randall Balestriero It is refreshing to have some new arguments pointing at specific distributions (Gaussian) our embeddings must follow! Especially now that we know how to do scalable distribution matching in high dimension with LeJEPA/SIGReg! Another win for Abraham de Moivre and Friedrich Gauss! David Klindt: What does JEPA actually learn? We can finally prove it 🌍 So excited to share our theory of identifiable World Models: LeJEPA recovers the latent variables of the world. Plan in the learned World Model as if it were real, same shortest path. 📄: http://klindtlab.github.io/lejepa-identifiability
items.zh_text: 转发 Randall Balestriero：看到一些新的论点指出我们的嵌入必须遵循特定的分布（高斯分布），这真是令人耳目一新！尤其是现在我们知道如何通过 LeJEPA/SIGReg 在高维空间中进行可扩展的分布匹配！这是 Abraham de Moivre 和 Friedrich Gauss 的又一次胜利！David Klindt：JEPA 到底学到了什么？我们终于可以证明它🌍 非常兴奋地分享我们关于可识别世界模型的理论：LeJEPA 恢复了世界的潜在变量。在学到的世界模型中规划，就像它是真实的一样，同样的最短路径。📄：http://klindtlab.github.io/lejepa-identifiability

items.original_text: RT Pushmeet Kohli When I was asked by the American Academy of Arts and Sciences to write an essay on my thoughts on how AI will accelerate Science, I felt honored but also felt that it would require a lot of thoughtfulness and diligence to distill my thoughts on paper. The essay has now been published and I cannot be more thankful to the @americanacad and @GoogleDeepMind teams for their feedback and encouragement during the process. Key reflections from my essay: 🔭 AI is our newest revolutionary lens: Just as the telescope and microscope expanded our physical perception, AI is extending our cognitive reach, allowing us to decipher the immense complexity of the data-universe. 🧬 The rise of "machine intuition": AI is not just a computational engine. By detecting hidden structures across disciplines—from protein folding to extremal combinatorics—it acts as an ultimate bridge, accelerating the interdisciplinary breakthroughs that modern science depends on. 🏗️ From puzzle-solvers to architects of questions: As we transition toward open-ended, agentic AI systems that actively generate novel hypotheses, the burden of reasoning is shifting. We are evolving from being the solvers of intricate puzzles into the architects of profound scientific questions. ✨ Expanding human potential: AI won't replace scientists; it expands what we can imagine and achieve. Just as the telescope didn't make astronomers obsolete, AI is giving us the stars. Read the full essay here: https://www.amacad.org/publication/daedalus/unlocking-scientific-intuition-reasoning-at-digital-speed
items.zh_text: 转推 Pushmeet Kohli：当美国艺术与科学院邀请我就人工智能将如何加速科学进步撰写一篇文章时，我感到荣幸，但也深知需要深思熟虑和勤奋才能将我的想法凝练于纸上。如今这篇文章已经发表，我无比感谢@americanacad和@GoogleDeepMind团队在此过程中给予的反馈和鼓励。我的文章中的关键思考：🔭 AI是我们最新的革命性透镜：正如望远镜和显微镜扩展了我们的物理感知，AI正在延伸我们的认知范围，让我们能够解读数据宇宙的巨大复杂性。🧬 “机器直觉”的崛起：AI不仅仅是一个计算引擎。通过检测从蛋白质折叠到极值组合学等跨学科的隐藏结构，它充当了终极桥梁，加速了现代科学所依赖的跨学科突破。🏗️ 从问题解决者到问题架构师：随着我们向开放式、具有主动性的AI系统过渡，这些系统能主动生成新颖假设，推理的负担正在转移。我们正从解决复杂谜题的人演变为提出深刻科学问题的架构师。✨ 扩展人类潜能：AI不会取代科学家；它扩展了我们可以想象和实现的范围。正如望远镜没有让天文学家过时一样，AI正在为我们提供星辰。在此阅读全文：https://www.amacad.org/publication/daedalus/unlocking-scientific-intuition-reasoning-at-digital-speed

items.original_text: DeepSeek flash is DIRT cheap and is great at mini agentic loops It is great for running large scale batch jobs Intelligence that is too cheap to meter 🚀🚀

items.original_text: The Deployments list was one of the earliest views I built on the (zeit) platform. One of the earliest 'acid tests' of Next.js was whether it could handle the dynamism of an app and the speed of a website, in one framework. Redesigning a view that's so heavily depended on is no small feat. While I didn't build this one, it was fun to be flagged-in to opine on the many variations the team tested to get this out 😁 Vercel Developers: The redesigned deployments list is here. See more deployments at once with a denser layout and an improved mobile experience. https://vercel.com/changelog/redesigned-deployments-list
items.zh_text: 部署列表是我在（zeit）平台上最早构建的视图之一。Next.js 最早的‘试金石’之一，就是它能否在一个框架中同时处理应用的动态性和网站的速度。重新设计一个如此高度依赖的视图绝非易事。虽然这个不是我构建的，但被邀请参与意见，看看团队为了推出这个而测试的多种变体，还是很有趣的 😁 Vercel 开发者：重新设计的部署列表来了。通过更紧凑的布局和改进的移动端体验，一次查看更多部署。https://vercel.com/changelog/redesigned-deployments-list

items.original_text: New on the Engineering Blog: The access and permissions we grant agents should evolve with their capabilities. In our own products, we set these parameters through sandboxing, which limits the scope of any potentially destructive actions. Read more: https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/how-we-contain-claude
items.zh_text: 工程博客新文章：我们授予智能体的访问和权限应随其能力的发展而演进。在我们自己的产品中，我们通过沙盒机制设置这些参数，以限制任何潜在破坏性行为的范围。了解更多：https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/how-we-contain-claude

items.original_text: Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah was invited to speak at today's presentation of Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas." Read the full text of his remarks: https://www.anthropic.com/news/chris-olah-pope-leo-encyclical

items.original_text: RT Pushmeet Kohli AI agents are advancing research-level math. 🚀 I’m thrilled to share @GoogleDeepMind’s AlphaProof Nexus - an agentic framework for formal proof search powered by Gemini. When applied to a set of open formal math problems, our agent autonomously solved: ✅ 9 open Erdős problems (including two open for 56 years!) ✅ 44 Online Encyclopedia of Integer Sequences (OEIS) problems ✅ A 15-year-old open problem in algebraic geometry ✅ A 7-year-old open question in min-max optimization We are collaborating with mathematicians across disciplines - from combinatorics and graph theory to quantum optics. Ultimately, these results show the massive potential of even simple agentic loops powered by Gemini. Read the paper here: https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22763v1
items.zh_text: RT Pushmeet Kohli：AI 智能体正在推进研究级数学。🚀 我很激动地分享 @GoogleDeepMind 的 AlphaProof Nexus——一个由 Gemini 驱动的形式化证明搜索智能体框架。当应用于一组开放的形式化数学问题时，我们的智能体自主解决了：✅ 9 个开放的 Erdős 问题（其中两个已开放 56 年！）✅ 44 个在线整数序列百科全书（OEIS）问题 ✅ 一个存在 15 年的代数几何开放问题 ✅ 一个存在 7 年的极小极大优化开放问题。我们正在与跨学科的数学家合作——从组合学、图论到量子光学。最终，这些结果展示了即使是由 Gemini 驱动的简单智能体循环也具有巨大潜力。在此阅读论文：https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.22763v1

items.original_text: Introducing OpenAI Guaranteed Capacity: a new offering that enables customers to guarantee long-term access to OpenAI compute. We’ve made long-term investments in infrastructure, partnerships, and capacity planning to help customers scale reliably. Now, Guaranteed Capacity helps customers plan ahead for critical workloads in a compute-constrained world. http://openai.com/guaranteed-capacity
items.zh_text: OpenAI 推出保障容量服务：一项新方案，让客户能够确保长期使用 OpenAI 的计算资源。我们在基础设施、合作伙伴关系和容量规划方面进行了长期投入，以帮助客户实现可靠扩展。如今，保障容量服务帮助客户在计算资源受限的环境中，提前规划关键工作负载。http://openai.com/guaranteed-capacity

items.original_text: We’re adding new ways for people to identify AI-generated images and understand where they came from. In addition to C2PA Content Credentials, images now also contain a SynthID watermark, and can be identified using a public verification tool to check whether an image was made by OpenAI products. https://openai.com/index/advancing-content-provenance/
items.zh_text: 我们正在增加新的方式，让人们识别AI生成的图像并了解其来源。除了C2PA内容凭证外，图像现在还包含SynthID水印，并且可以使用公开验证工具来检查图像是否由OpenAI产品生成。

items.original_text: Personal update: I've joined Anthropic. I think the next few years at the frontier of LLMs will be especially formative. I am very excited to join the team here and get back to R&D. I remain deeply passionate about education and plan to resume my work on it in time.
items.zh_text: 个人动态：我已加入Anthropic。我认为未来几年在大语言模型前沿领域将尤为关键。我非常兴奋能加入这里的团队并重返研发工作。我依然对教育充满热情，并计划适时重启相关事业。

items.original_text: Horrible Congressman Thomas Massie put out an old Endorsement, from many years ago, of him by me long before I found out that he was the Worst Congressman in the History of our Country. I endorsed Ed Gallrein, a true American Patriot, which Massie knows full well, so the statement that he put out is fraudulent, just like HE is fraudulent. WITHDRAW YOUR FAKE STATEMENT, MASSIE, RIGHT NOW! President DONALD J. TRUMP
items.zh_text: 可恶的国会议员托马斯·马西发布了一份多年前我给他的旧背书，那是在我发现他是我国历史上最糟糕的国会议员之前很久的事了。我背书了埃德·加雷因，一位真正的美国爱国者，马西对此心知肚明，所以他发布的声明是欺诈性的，就像他本人一样欺诈。马西，立即撤回你的虚假声明！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统

items.original_text: Over the past few months, we've been holding dialogues with scholars, philosophers, clergy, and ethicists on the questions AI raises—starting with how good character forms. Read more about how we’re widening the conversation on frontier AI: https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai
items.zh_text: 过去几个月里，我们一直在与学者、哲学家、神职人员和伦理学家就人工智能引发的问题进行对话——从良好品格如何形成开始。了解更多关于我们如何拓宽前沿人工智能对话的信息：https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai

items.original_text: Rho cut weekly meeting time by 90% with Perplexity Computer. Computer checks Slack, Notion, Jira, Figma, and Google Docs, then flags missing tasks and changes the team needs to see. 120 work hours saved during a 12-week project. Read the customer story: https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/rho
items.zh_text: Rho 借助 Perplexity Computer 将每周会议时间减少了 90%。Computer 会检查 Slack、Notion、Jira、Figma 和 Google Docs，然后标记团队需要关注的遗漏任务和变更。在一个 12 周的项目中节省了 120 个工时。阅读客户案例：https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/rho

items.original_text: Our new multi-model agentic security system brings together more than 100 specialized agents across frontier and custom models to find exploitable bugs, delivering top performance on the CyberGym benchmark. We used it ahead of Patch Tuesday to help find and fix 16 vulnerabilities. Today we’re announcing that customers can sign up to test it in private preview. https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2026/05/12/defense-at-ai-speed-microsofts-new-multi-model-agentic-security-system-tops-leading-industry-benchmark/?v=1
items.zh_text: 我们的全新多模型自主安全系统整合了超过100个专业智能体，涵盖前沿模型与定制模型，用于发现可利用漏洞，在CyberGym基准测试中取得了顶尖性能。我们在补丁星期二之前使用该系统帮助发现并修复了16个漏洞。今天，我们宣布客户可以注册参与该系统的私有预览测试。

items.original_text: PayPal runs 74,000 weekly tasks in Perplexity Enterprise. Teams use it for model validation, channel performance, market trend research, competitive intelligence, and product analysis. Read the customer story: https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/paypal
items.zh_text: PayPal 在 Perplexity Enterprise 上每周运行 74,000 个任务。团队将其用于模型验证、渠道绩效、市场趋势研究、竞争情报和产品分析。阅读客户案例：https://www.perplexity.ai/enterprise/customers/paypal

items.original_text: This works really well btw, at the end of your query ask your LLM to "structure your response as HTML", then view the generated file in your browser. I've also had some success asking the LLM to present its output as slideshows, etc. More generally, imo audio is the human-preferred input to AIs but vision (images/animations/video) is the preferred output from them. Around a ~third of our brains are a massively parallel processor dedicated to vision, it is the 10-lane superhighway of information into brain. As AI improves, I think we'll see a progression that takes advantage: 1) raw text (hard/effortful to read) 2) markdown (bold, italic, headings, tables, a bit easier on the eyes) <-- current default 3) HTML (still procedural with underlying code, but a lot more flexibility on the graphics, layout, even interactivity) <-- early but forming new good default ...4,5,6,... n) interactive neural videos/simulations Imo the extrapolation (though the technology doesn't exist just yet) ends in some kind of interactive videos generated directly by a diffusion neural net. Many open questions as to how exact/procedural "Software 1.0" artifacts (e.g. interactive simulations) may be woven together with neural artifacts (diffusion grids), but generally something in the direction of the recently viral https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444 There are also improvements necessary and pending at the input. Audio nor text nor video alone are not enough, e.g. I feel a need to point/gesture to things on the screen, similar to all the things you would do with a person physically next to you and your computer screen. TLDR The input/output mind meld between humans and AIs is ongoing and there is a lot of work to do and significant progress to be made, way before jumping all the way into neuralink-esque BCIs and all that. For what's worth exploring at the current stage, hot tip try ask for HTML. Thariq: http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.zh_text: 顺便说一句，这个方法效果很好：在提问结束时，让你的大语言模型“以 HTML 格式组织回答”，然后在浏览器中查看生成的文件。我还曾成功让大语言模型以幻灯片等形式输出结果。更广泛地说，我认为音频是人类偏好的 AI 输入方式，而视觉（图像/动画/视频）则是人类偏好的 AI 输出方式。我们大脑中大约三分之一的部分是一个专门处理视觉的大规模并行处理器，它是信息进入大脑的 10 车道高速公路。随着 AI 的进步，我认为我们会看到一系列利用这一优势的演进：1) 纯文本（阅读起来费力/费劲）2) Markdown（粗体、斜体、标题、表格，对眼睛稍微友好一些）<-- 当前默认 3) HTML（仍然有底层代码的程序性，但在图形、布局甚至交互性上灵活得多）<-- 早期但正在形成新的良好默认值 ...4,5,6,... n) 交互式神经视频/模拟。我认为这种外推（尽管技术尚未存在）最终会走向由扩散神经网络直接生成的某种交互式视频。关于“软件 1.0”产物（例如交互式模拟）如何与神经产物（扩散网格）精确/程序性地交织在一起，仍有许多悬而未决的问题，但总体方向类似于最近爆火的 https://x.com/zan2434/status/2046982383430496444。在输入方面也有必要且待进行的改进。仅靠音频、文本或视频都不够，例如，我觉得需要指向/手势操作屏幕上的内容，就像你与一个真人并肩坐在电脑前所做的一切。简而言之，人类与 AI 之间的输入/输出思维融合正在进行中，还有大量工作要做，且需要取得重大进展，远在直接跳入 Neuralink 式的脑机接口等之前。就当前阶段值得探索的内容而言，一个小窍门是尝试要求输出 HTML。Thariq：http://x.com/i/article/2052796100608974848
items.media_note: 该动态可能包含 X 原生媒体，当前 RSS 未提供视频文件，请打开原帖观看。

items.original_text: Excel has quietly been Turing complete for a long time. Nice to see it now edging toward "AI complete"—SGD, attention, next-token prediction… all in cells. Austin Henley: Excel Copilot one-shotted a tiny GPT-style language model for me inside a spreadsheet: embeddings, causal attention, weights trained with stochastic gradient descent, next-token prediction, and a live slider to watch it learn.
items.zh_text: Excel 早已悄然图灵完备。如今它正迈向“AI 完备”——随机梯度下降、注意力机制、下一个词元预测……全都在单元格内实现，令人欣喜。Austin Henley：Excel Copilot 在电子表格中为我一次性构建了一个微型 GPT 风格语言模型：嵌入层、因果注意力、通过随机梯度下降训练的权重、下一个词元预测，以及一个实时滑块来观察学习过程。

items.original_text: This is the the quote I've been citing a lot recently. kache: you can outsource your thinking but you cannot outsource your understanding
items.zh_text: 这是我最近经常引用的一句话。kache：你可以外包你的思考，但你不能外包你的理解。
